news.title: Redwood Materials lays off 10% in restructuring to chase energy storage business
news.summary: The company is restructuring some teams to accommodate a booming energy storage business, according to emails viewed by TechCrunch.

news.title: Meta will record employees’ keystrokes and use it to train its AI models
news.summary: Meta says that it has a new internal tool that is converting mouse movements and button clicks into data that can train its AI models.

news.title: Unauthorized group has gained access to Anthropic’s exclusive cyber tool Mythos, report claims
news.summary: Anthropic told TechCrunch it is investigating the claims, but maintains that there is no evidence that its systems have been impacted.

news.title: Tim Cook is stepping down as CEO of Apple: Here’s a look at his 15-year legacy, from new products and services to China expansion
news.summary: Cook, who joined Apple in 1998, succeeded Steve Jobs as CEO in 2011 and went on to transform Apple into a $4 trillion powerhouse.

news.summary: With an IPO looming for Elon Musk's SpaceX / xAI / X combo platter of companies, SpaceX has announced an odd arrangement to either acquire the automated programming platform Cursor for $60 billion or pay a fee of $10 billion. news.title: ISS astronauts are getting new laptops
news.summary: Even astronauts need to level up their laptops once in a while - including the crew of Expedition 74 on board the ISS, which NASA announced last week is in the process of some computer upgrades. news.title: Pentagon wants $54B for drones, more than most nations’ military budgets
news.summary: The proposed Pentagon drone investment rivals Ukraine’s entire military budget.

news.title: Mozilla: Anthropic's Mythos found 271 security vulnerabilities in Firefox 150
news.summary: CTO says new AI model is "every bit as capable" as world's best security researchers.

news.title: Supreme Court arguments make it clear that FCC fines are "nonbinding"
news.summary: FCC tells Supreme Court its fines are nonbinding unless a jury upholds penalty.

news.title: Framework Has a Better, More Take-Apartable Laptop
news.summary: The company announced its new Framework Laptop 13 Pro, along with updates to its 16-inch model.

news.title: OpenAI Beefs Up ChatGPT’s Image Generation Model
news.summary: The ChatGPT Images 2.0 model is here. Our testing shows it’s better at creating more detailed images and rendering text, but it still struggles with languages other than English.

news.title: Mozilla Used Anthropic’s Mythos to Find and Fix 271 Bugs in Firefox
news.summary: The Firefox team doesn’t think emerging AI capabilities will upend cybersecurity long term, but they warn that software developers are likely in for a rocky transition.

news.title: Tim Cook’s Legacy Is Turning Apple Into a Subscription
news.summary: The soon-to-exit Apple CEO went all in on services. Now, the incoming CEO, John Ternus, will need to embrace the AI era.

news.title: Meta Is Sued Over Scam Ads on Facebook and Instagram
news.summary: A lawsuit from the Consumer Federation of America accuses Meta of misleading consumers about its efforts to combat scams advertisements on its platforms.
